description_long: This is a rectangular, dark wooden storage box with a visibly weathered and aged surface, featuring metal bolts at each corner for reinforcement. The wood grain is prominent, and the box is stained with streaks and splatters of a dark red substance, suggesting it has seen rough use or has been exposed to the elements. The sides are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, and the ends are framed with thicker wooden beams. The box appears to be hollow inside, with open slats visible at the ends, indicating it is not fully sealed. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, giving it a utilitarian and somewhat mysterious appearance. The overall construction suggests it is sturdy enough to support weight on its top surface and is likely intended for storage or transport of goods in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A dark, weathered wooden storage box reinforced with metal bolts and stained with red marks, featuring open slatted ends and a rugged, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: End view showing the open slatted interior framed by thick wooden beams and metal bolts at the corners.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the box, horizontal wooden planks, and prominent red stains running down the surface.
description_view_2: Opposite end view similar to view 0, with visible open slats and additional red stains on the wood.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, showing the length of the box, horizontal planks, and fewer visible stains.
